message:
fix: Zig 0.15 Py_True/Py_False and @ptrFromInt(0) compatibility

- Py_True/Py_False macros use _PyObject_CAST with comma expressions that
  Zig @cImport cannot translate. Use &_Py_TrueStruct/_Py_FalseStruct directly.
- @ptrFromInt(0) not allowed for [*]u8 — use allowzero cast for WASM memory.
- Fix in _zerobuf, _hashlib, _json modules.
